summary:
The patient presents with symmetric, bilaterally occurring limb jerks accompanied by minor cervical twitches—consistent with synchronous motor events seen in Myoclonic Epilepsy of Infancy. This pattern best matches multifocal clonic seizures due to their characteristic bilateral symmetry and lack of sustained tonic phases.

---
